function.name: bookAppointment
function.description: Confirm and book the appointment after the caller has selected a slot from the availability results. Pass back all slot metadata from the availability response to enable accurate booking.

phone.description: Guest's phone number, digits only, including area code

service.description: Full service string with all add-ons, e.g. '60-min Relaxation Massage + Hot Stone + CBD Enhancement (lavender)'

slot_description.description: Human-readable description of the chosen slot, e.g. 'Wednesday, May 28 at 2:00 PM with Alex'

staff_name.description: Name of the therapist for the chosen slot

raw_start.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the chosen slot as returned by checkAvailability, e.g. '2025-05-28T14:00:00'. Pass exactly as received.

slot_service_id.description: Meevo service ID from the chosen availability slot. Pass exactly as received from checkAvailability.

slot_staff_id.description: Meevo staff ID from the chosen availability slot. Pass exactly as received from checkAvailability.

notes.description: Pressure preference, health concerns, therapist notes, membership status, first-time guest info
